CustomField.description: שדה עזר לפרוסס בילדר אם הפעולה הרפואית היא אחת מהמוגדרות לניתוח של 360
CustomField.formula: RecordType.DeveloperName = "Surgeries" && NOT(ISNULL(Medical_Procedure__c)) && OR( ( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "85.23") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "85.20") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "85.22") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "85.71") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "85.7") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "85.4") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "85.81") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "85.4322") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "85.61") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "85.82") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "85.83") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "85.9") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "86.9") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "85.002") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "85.1201") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "19125") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "191252") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "191253") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "76097") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "76098") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "76099") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "760904") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "19102") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "191055") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "19500") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "72144") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "72145") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "85.85") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "85.45") ,( Medical_Procedure__r.Procedure_Code__c = "85.432"))
CustomField.label: X360 Surgery Related?
